other_observers: none; Yes, so far as I know
duration: about 3 min.- long enough to check Sibley and get the camera out and take a picture
specific_location: Sawhill Pond - second pond west of the Sawhill Pond sign. It was sitting in the middle of the pond in a brush/reed area. (There are a number of brush/reed areas in that pond.)
description: Small size but larger than a robin- Tan side with white shoulder stripe - Dark on top of head and top of back - Light belly and throat with stripe on side - Long yellowish bill - Dark eye - Light colored legs - Heron type shape - Very small tail  A not very good photo will hopefully accompany this report.Behaviors: Sat on a bush in the middle of the pond in full sun for several minutes and then walk around the bush onto the other side and disappeared in the bush and reed area.Call: nonePlumage: Breeding
